Suppressor.flavor: A suppressor reduces the audible report and muzzle flash of a firearm, making it harder to detect when fired.
Suppressor.description:
Effects

  • Applies the Suppressed quality to the weapon.

Scope.flavor: A scope is an optical device that provides magnification and improved aiming capabilities for firearms.
Scope.description:
Effects

  • Applies the Scoped quality to the weapon.

Heavy Barrel.flavor: A heavy barrel is a reinforced barrel that can withstand higher pressures, but the weight reduces the user's ability to sustain fire.
Heavy Barrel.description:
Effects

  • Applies the Heavy Barrel quality to the weapon.

Compensator.flavor: A compensator is a device attached to the muzzle of a firearm that redirects propellant gases to counter recoil and unwanted rising of the barrel during rapid fire.
Compensator.description:
Effects

  • Applies the Compensated quality to the weapon.

Basic Medical Supplies.flavor: Basic medical supplies include bandages, antiseptics, and other materials for treating minor injuries and stabilizing patients.
Basic Medical Supplies.description:
Effects

  • Reduce the TN of one medicine check by 1. Discard after use.

Medical Kit.flavor: A medical kit contains supplies for treating injuries and stabilizing patients in the field.
Medical Kit.description:
Effects

  • Reduce the TN of one medicine check by 1. Contains 4 uses.

Flashbang.flavor: A flashbang is a non-lethal explosive device that emits a bright flash of light and a loud noise to disorient targets.
Flashbang.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the flashbang at a target area within 2 range bands.

    • Effects

    • All targets within range 1 of the target area must make a TN 4 Resolve check or be inflicted with the Disoriented condition for 1 round.

Grenade.flavor: A grenade is a small explosive device that can be thrown to cause damage to targets within its blast radius.
Grenade.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the grenade at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • All targets within range 1 of the target area take 4 damage.

Smoke Grenade.flavor: A smoke grenade is a non-lethal device that emits a cloud of smoke to obscure vision and provide cover.
Smoke Grenade.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the smoke grenade at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • Create a cloud of smoke in the target area, converting the area intoObscuring Terrain for 1 round.

Incendiary Grenade.flavor: An incendiary grenade fills an area with burning chemicals that cling to surfaces and continue burning. Used for area denial and clearing fortified positions.
Incendiary Grenade.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the incendiary grenade at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • The target area becomes burning terrain for 2 rounds. Characters who enter or start their turn in the area take 3 damage.

Tear Gas Canister.flavor: A canister that releases a cloud of tear gas, causing severe eye and respiratory irritation. Standard crowd control equipment for urban security forces.
Tear Gas Canister.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, deploy the tear gas canister at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • Creates a cloud of irritant gas in the target area for 2 rounds.
  • Characters in the area must make a TN 3 Resolve check or gain the Disoriented condition for as long as they remain in the area and 1 round after leaving.
  • T-Dolls with Olfactory Units installed are affected normally. T-Dolls without are unaffected.

Breaching Charge.flavor: A breaching charge is an explosive device designed to breach doors, walls, or other barriers, allowing for quick entry into a secured area.
Breaching Charge.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, place the breaching charge on a door, wall, or other barrier at range 0. Arming requires a full round action. At the start of your next turn, it detonates.

Effects

  • Destroy the targeted barrier and create a clear path through it. Any characters within range 1 of the blast take 3 damage.

EMP Grenade.flavor: An EMP grenade is a device that emits a burst of electromagnetic energy, disrupting or damaging electronic devices within its blast radius.
EMP Grenade.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the EMP grenade at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • T-Dolls and other automata within range 1 of the blast gain the incapacitated condition effect for 1 round.

Collapse Grenade.flavor: A collapse grenade is a powerful explosive device that explodes with collapse radiation, causing severe damage to targets within its blast radius and leaving behind a hazardous zone.
Collapse Grenade.description:
Activation

  • As an attack action, throw the collapse grenade at a target area within 2 range bands.

Effects

  • All targets within range 2 of the target area take aSeverity 10 Critical and immediately gain 12 points on their Collapse Track. The target area becomes a Collapse Storm for the rest of the scene.

Qualities

  • Illegal: Being caught with one is reason enough for summary execution in many places.

Collapse Bomb.flavor: A collapse bomb is a powerful explosive device that detonates with collapse radiation, causing severe damage to targets within its blast radius and leaving behind a hazardous zone.
Collapse Bomb.description:
Activation

  • Place the collapse bomb at your current location. Arming requires a full round action. At the start of your next turn, it detonates.

Effects

  • All targets within range 6 of the detonation point take take a Severity 15 Critical, and immediately fill the remainder of their collapse track's current level. The entire area within range 6 becomes a Collapse Storm for the rest of the scene.

Qualities

  • Bulky: Requires at least 2 characters to carry. While carrying it, those characters cannot take attack actions.
  • Illegal: Being caught with one is reason enough for summary execution in many places.

Portable Chemistry Kit.flavor: A portable chemistry kit contains the tools and materials necessary for basic chemical synthesis and analysis in the field.
Portable Chemistry Kit.description: Required for the Chemical Synthesis technique.

Pocket Knife.flavor: A pocket knife is a small, folding blade that can be used for a variety of tasks, from cutting rope to self-defense.
Pocket Knife.description:
Effects

  • Not long enough to be used as a weapon.
  • can be used for utility purposes such as cutting through materials or opening containers.

Pack of Gum.flavor: A pack of gum is a small, portable item that can provide a moment of comfort and distraction in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Pack of Gum.description:
Effects

  • Chewing gum provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Pack of Cigarettes.flavor: A pack of cigarettes is a small, portable item that can provide a moment of comfort and distraction in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Pack of Cigarettes.description:
Effects

  • Smoking provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.
  • Gives your character cancer in ~20 years if they live that long.

Hamburger.flavor: A hamburger from a street vendor in a Green Zone market. The meat may or may not be beef, but the sauce is decent and the bread is fresh enough. It is a small taste of normalcy in a broken world.
Hamburger.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits. It is a good hamburger.

Chocolate Bar.flavor: A small bar of chocolate, wrapped in slightly worn foil. Real cacao is hard to come by these days, but synthetic chocolate has come a long way since the war. It is sweet, and that is enough.
Chocolate Bar.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a small comfort in difficult moments.

Bottled Water.flavor: A sealed bottle of clean drinking water. In the Yellow Zones, this is worth more than its price suggests. In the Green Zones, it comes from a vending machine.

Hard Candy.flavor: A small handful of individually wrapped hard candies. They last a long time in the mouth, which is the whole point. A moment of sweetness when there is not much else.
Hard Candy.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a small comfort or a gesture of goodwill when offered to others.

Can of Beans.flavor: A can of beans is the backbone of post-war cuisine. It is filling, keeps forever, and comes in a dozen varieties that all taste roughly the same. A reliable meal when there is nothing else.
Can of Beans.description:
Effects

  • Provides a filling meal. Can be eaten cold, but is better heated.

Instant Noodles.flavor: A packet of instant noodles with a tiny sachet of seasoning powder. It is not a good meal, but it is a hot meal, and in the field that distinction matters.
Instant Noodles.description:
Effects

  • Provides a hot meal when boiling water is available. No mechanical benefits, but warm food improves morale.

Duct Tape.flavor: A roll of silver duct tape. The universal fixer. Holds gear together, patches holes, secures splints, and silences captives. Every operator knows to carry at least one roll.
Duct Tape.description:
Effects

  • Can be used for field repairs, binding objects, or improvised restraints. With a successful Crafting check, can temporarily repair damaged equipment.

Road Flare.flavor: A bright red road flare that burns for several minutes. Useful for signaling, marking landing zones, or starting fires in wet conditions.
Road Flare.description:
Effects

  • When ignited, produces a bright red light visible at long range for 10 minutes.
  • Can be used to start fires. Burns hot enough to ignite damp materials.

Flashlight.flavor: A sturdy handheld flashlight. Not military grade, but reliable enough for urban exploration and navigating dark buildings.
Flashlight.description:
Effects

  • Provides illumination in dark environments out to a reasonable distance.
  • Can be used to signal or disorient targets in low light.

Disposable Lighter.flavor: A cheap plastic lighter with a vague brand name printed on the side. It works until it doesn't. Useful for starting fires, lighting candles, or burning the ends of cut ropes.
Disposable Lighter.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to start fires, light cigarettes, or heat small objects.
  • Contains enough fuel for roughly a month of regular use before running dry.

Bar of Soap.flavor: A plain bar of soap. Cleanliness is one of those small luxuries that separates the civilized from the desperate. A hot shower and a fresh bar of soap can change a person's whole outlook.
Bar of Soap.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but helps maintain hygiene and morale during extended field operations.

Sewing Kit.flavor: A small tin containing needles, thread, buttons, and a thimble. Mending a torn uniform or patching a backpack is a small skill that makes a big difference over time.
Sewing Kit.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to repair clothing, webbing, or fabric equipment.

Journal and Pen.flavor: A blank notebook with a sturdy cover and a reliable pen. Some operators keep mission logs. Others write letters they will never send. A few keep track of the faces they have seen along the way.
Journal and Pen.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be used to record information, keep a personal journal, or leave messages.

Dice Set.flavor: A small pouch containing a set of polyhedral dice in a variety of colors. Useful for resolving disputes, playing games of chance, or settling who pulls the first watch.
Dice Set.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of entertainment and morale during downtime.

Bandana.flavor: A square of cloth with a hundred uses: head covering, face mask, filter, tourniquet extension, signal marker, or just a splash of color in a gray world.
Bandana.description:
Effects

  • Can be used as a makeshift face covering, headband, or light cloth strap.

Spare Socks.flavor: A clean pair of socks. Simple, underappreciated, and transformative after three days in damp boots. Every operator knows the value of dry feet.
Spare Socks.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits. Dry socks improve morale.

Canned Stew.flavor: A can of hearty stew with actual chunks of meat and vegetables. Not gourmet by any measure, but a step up from a ration brick. Best eaten warm.
Canned Stew.description:
Effects

  • Provides a filling meal. Tastes better when heated.

Ration Brick.flavor: Tastes like cardboard, but it'll keep you alive when there's nothing else to eat.
Ration Brick.description:
Effects

  • Provides you with all the calories you need to survive for a day.

Bottle of Spirits.flavor: A bottle of cheap but drinkable liquor. Whiskey, vodka, or whatever the local distiller managed to make this month. Good for celebrating, commiserating, or disinfecting wounds in a pinch.
Bottle of Spirits.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of comfort and morale during downtime.
  • In a pinch, can be used as a makeshift antiseptic.

Civilian Outfit.flavor: An unremarkable set of civilian clothes: jacket, shirt, trousers. Designed to help operators blend into Green Zone population centers without the telltale signs of military or security work.
Civilian Outfit.description:
Effects

  • Reduces the chance of being identified as security or military personnel at a distance. Does not provide armor or protection.

Sturdy Boots.flavor: A pair of well-made boots that have already been broken in. Good footwear is the difference between a successful patrol and a miserable one. These will last years if you treat them right.
Sturdy Boots.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but reduces the risk of foot injury and improves comfort during extended travel.

Rain Gear.flavor: A waterproof jacket and over-trousers that pack down small. Staying dry is a minor miracle in the field, and one that does wonders for everyone's patience.
Rain Gear.description:
Effects

  • Keeps the wearer dry in wet conditions. Provides no combat protection.

Sleeping Bag.flavor: A compact sleeping bag rated for mild to moderate temperatures. Provides a clean, insulated place to sleep when the nearest bed is a contaminated ruin.
Sleeping Bag.description:
Effects

  • Provides protection from the elements during rest. Improves quality of sleep in field conditions.

Pocket Radio.flavor: A small battery-powered radio that picks up local broadcasts. News, music, propaganda, and emergency alerts from the URNC's state channels, if you can tolerate the static.
Pocket Radio.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to listen to local broadcasts for news, weather, and emergency alerts.
  • Can be a source of comfort and entertainment during downtime.

Handcuffs.flavor: Standard issue restraint cuffs, stout steel with a double-lock mechanism to prevent tightening. Comes with two keys that you will immediately lose.
Handcuffs.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to restrain a willing or subdued target.
  • Escaping requires a TN 4 Subterfuge check or outside assistance.

Emergency Blanket.flavor: A thin reflective sheet that reflects body heat. Not comfortable, but it will keep you alive through a cold night when folded properly.
Emergency Blanket.description:
Effects

  • Provides emergency insulation against cold. Can also be used as a signal mirror.

Compass.flavor: A magnetic compass in a rugged metal case. Does not require batteries, does not rely on satellites, and does not care about URNC signal blackouts. It always points north.
Compass.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to navigate without GPS or electronic aids.

Signal Whistle.flavor: A metal whistle that produces a piercing tone audible from a considerable distance. Simple, reliable, and louder than shouting.
Signal Whistle.description:
Effects

  • Can be heard from a great distance. Useful for signaling, coordinating movement in low visibility, or summoning help.

Board Game.flavor: A complete board game in a battered box, missing exactly one piece that everyone has learned to improvise around. A good way to pass the time during long watches or forced downtime.
Board Game.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of entertainment and bonding during downtime.

Collapse Protective Equipment.flavor: Collapse protective equipment is specialized gear designed to shield the wearer from the harmful effects of collapse radiation. It typically includes a full-body suit made of radiation-resistant materials, along with a helmet and respirator to protect the head and respiratory system.
Collapse Protective Equipment.description:
Effects

  • While wearing this equipment, you reduce effective exposure to collapse radiation by one zone step.

Gas Mask.flavor: A full-face respirator with a replaceable filter canister. Protects the wearer from tear gas, smoke, airborne toxins, and most chemical agents.
Gas Mask.description:
Effects

  • Provides immunity to airborne toxins, tear gas, and smoke effects.
  • Filter canister lasts for 8 hours of continuous use before needing replacement.

Hazmat Suit.flavor: A fully sealed protective suit with an integrated air supply. Provides comprehensive protection against chemical, biological, and radiological hazards.
Hazmat Suit.description:
Effects

  • Provides immunity to airborne toxins, chemical agents, and biological hazards.
  • Integrated air supply lasts for 2 hours.
  • Bulky: imposes a penalty of 1 on all Swiftness checks while worn.

ELID Vaccine.flavor: An ELID vaccine is a medical treatment designed to prevent or mitigate the effects of ELID infection. It works by stimulating the immune system to recognize and fight the virus, providing protection against infection or reducing the severity of symptoms if infection occurs.
ELID Vaccine.description:
Effects

  • Resets the progression of the Collapse Track to 0. Does not remove existing ELID conditions.

Collapse Radiation Detector.flavor: A handheld device that measures ambient collapse radiation levels and provides alerts when dangerous thresholds are reached. Essential for Yellow and Red Zone operations.
Collapse Radiation Detector.description:
Effects

  • Provides precise readings of collapse radiation levels in the current area.
  • Alerts the user when radiation levels reach dangerous thresholds.

Tourniquet.flavor: A tourniquet is a device used to apply pressure to a limb to stop severe bleeding. It can be a lifesaving tool in emergency situations.
Tourniquet.description:
Effects

  • Removes the bleeding condition when applied to a limb until removed.
  • Inflicts the Lightly wounded condition until removed.

Grappling Hook.flavor: A grappling hook is a device consisting of a hook attached to a rope, used for climbing or securing objects. It can be thrown or fired to latch onto surfaces, allowing the user to ascend or traverse difficult terrain.
Grappling Hook.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to climb or traverse surfaces that would otherwise be inaccessible. Can be used to create makeshift cover by latching onto objects and pulling them into position.

Paracord.flavor: Paracord is a lightweight, durable rope originally used in parachute suspension lines. It's a versatile tool that can be used for a variety of purposes, from securing gear to creating makeshift shelters.
Paracord.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to tie objects together, create makeshift restraints, or secure gear. With some creativity, it can also be used for climbing or creating traps.

Zip Ties.flavor: Zip ties are a type of fastener used to secure items together. They are commonly used for bundling cables, but can also be used for a variety of other purposes in the field.
Zip Ties.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to tie objects together or create makeshift restraints. Not as strong as paracord, but more compact and easier to carry.

Folding Shovel.flavor: A collapsible entrenching tool with a hardened steel blade that folds into a compact carry configuration. Useful for digging fighting positions or clearing debris.
Folding Shovel.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to dig, clear debris, or create defensive positions.
  • In a pinch, can be used as an improvised weapon (treat as a club with damage 2).

Portable Battery Pack.flavor: A high-capacity rechargeable battery pack with multiple output ports. Enough juice to keep a radio, flashlight, or portable electronics running for days in the field.
Portable Battery Pack.description:
Effects

  • Can recharge electronic devices in the field. Provides enough power for roughly one week of normal device usage before needing recharging itself.

Climbing Carabiners.flavor: A set of four locking carabiners with screw-gate mechanisms. Each is rated for significant static weight. Essential for rappelling or securing loads.
Climbing Carabiners.description:
Effects

  • Can be used for climbing, rappelling, securing gear, or creating anchored positions.

Camouflage Net.flavor: A lightweight mesh net printed with a multi-spectrum camouflage pattern. Draped over equipment or a position, it breaks up the visual outline and provides concealment from aerial observation.
Camouflage Net.description:
Effects

  • Can be deployed to conceal a position, vehicle, or equipment.

Portable Water Filter.flavor: A compact pump-action water filter that removes bacteria, protozoa, and sediment from natural water sources. Turns a muddy puddle into drinkable water in about a minute.
Portable Water Filter.description:
Effects

  • Can purify water from natural sources, making it safe to drink. Does not remove chemical contaminants or collapse radiation.

Survival Knife.flavor: A full-tang fixed-blade knife with a textured grip and a thick spine suitable for light prying. Designed to handle the abuse of field survival tasks.
Survival Knife.description:
Effects

  • Can be used for heavy utility tasks: prying, splitting wood, batoning, and other survival applications.
  • In combat, treat as an improvised knife (damage 2, deadliness 3).

Camp Axe.flavor: A compact forest axe with a 60 cm handle and a sharpened steel head. Splits firewood, clears brush, and in a desperate situation, serves as a capable melee weapon.
Camp Axe.description:
Effects

  • Can be used for cutting wood, clearing vegetation, or breaching light barriers.
  • In combat, treat as an improvised axe (damage 3, deadliness 4).

Long Range Radio.flavor: A military-grade portable radio transceiver with encrypted frequency hopping and extended range. Essential for maintaining contact across significant distances.
Long Range Radio.description:
Effects

  • Allows secure communication over long distances (up to 50 km in ideal conditions).
  • Encrypted frequency hopping makes interception difficult.

Customization Kit.flavor: A portable case of modular cosmetic components for T-Doll frames: adjustable facial structure settings, synthetic hair and eye color packs, and attachment points for superficial additions like animal ears, tails, or decorative plating. Changing your look is a statement of identity, and in a world that treats Dolls as equipment, identity matters.
Customization Kit.description:
Effects

  • Allows a T-Doll to modify her superficial appearance: facial features, body proportions within standard frame limits, hair style and color, eye color, and cosmetic additions (animal ears, tails, decorative markings).
  • Changes are reversible and non-damaging to the frame. Application takes approximately 30 minutes.
  • With a successful Arts check, can create a convincing disguise that holds up to casual inspection.

Formal Attire.flavor: A well-made formal outfit suitable for business meetings, corporate functions, or any situation where blending in with the upper classes is essential. Comes with a collapsible carry bag to keep it presentable.
Formal Attire.description:
Effects

  • Reduces TN for social checks in formal or corporate settings when appropriate attire is expected.

Cold Weather Parka.flavor: A heavy insulated parka rated for sub-zero temperatures. Bulky, but warmth is not optional in a Yellow Zone winter. The hood is big enough to fit over most helmet configurations.
Cold Weather Parka.description:
Effects

  • Protects against extreme cold. Improves survival outcomes in freezing environments.
  • Bulky: imposes a penalty of 1 on Swiftness checks while worn.

Impersonation Uniform.flavor: A high-quality replica of a specific organization's uniform: URNC security, NOMFA inspector, corporate logistics. The details matter more than the fabric: patches, insignia, cut, and wear patterns all sell the impression.
Impersonation Uniform.description:
Effects

  • Provides a bonus to Deception and Performance checks when impersonating a member of the corresponding organization.
  • Does not hold up to close scrutiny by actual members of that organization without supporting credentials and behavior.

Thermal Regulating Undersuit.flavor: A lightweight full-body undersuit lined with phase-change material that actively regulates temperature. Keeps the wearer comfortable across a wide range of environmental conditions. Popular among operators who work in both climate-controlled buildings and contaminated ruins.
Thermal Regulating Undersuit.description:
Effects

  • Keeps the wearer comfortable in extreme heat or cold, reducing fatigue from environmental temperature.
  • Can be worn under armor without penalty.

Night Vision Goggles.flavor: Night vision goggles are a device that allows the wearer to see in low-light conditions by amplifying available light. They can be a crucial tool for navigating and operating in dark environments.
Night Vision Goggles.description:
Effects

  • May be used to negate the effects of darkness, allowing the wearer to see in low-light conditions.

Thermal Goggles.flavor: Goggles that detect heat signatures, allowing the wearer to see living beings through smoke, darkness, and light cover.
Thermal Goggles.description:
Effects

  • Allows the wearer to see heat signatures through smoke, darkness, and light cover.
  • Can detect hidden living creatures within range, making Stealth checks against thermal detection more difficult.

Binoculars.flavor: Binoculars are a pair of lenses that allow the user to see distant objects more clearly. They can be a valuable tool for scouting and reconnaissance in the field.
Binoculars.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to see distant objects more clearly, effectively increasing your visual range.

Handheld Spotlight.flavor: A high-intensity searchlight that can illuminate targets at considerable distance. Heavy and draws significant power, but turns night into day.
Handheld Spotlight.description:
Effects

  • Provides powerful illumination out to long range.
  • Can be used to blind or disorient targets at range. Targets caught in the beam must make a TN 2 Resolve check or be Disoriented for 1 round.

Consumer Drone.flavor: A civilian quadcopter drone with a camera and basic stabilization. Slow and fragile, but provides an aerial perspective invaluable for reconnaissance.
Consumer Drone.description:
Effects

  • Can be deployed for aerial reconnaissance. Provides a bird's-eye view of the area.
  • Flight time of approximately 30 minutes. Range of 1 km from the operator.
  • Fragile: easily destroyed by gunfire or electronic countermeasures.

Portable Signal Jammer.flavor: A compact device that broadcasts noise across a wide range of frequencies, disrupting wireless communications and drone control signals within its radius.
Portable Signal Jammer.description:
Effects

  • When activated, creates a zone of signal interference in a radius of 3 range bands.
  • Prevents wireless communication and drone operation within the zone.
  • Lasts for 1 hour of continuous operation before the battery is depleted.

Motion Detector.flavor: A portable radar-based motion detector that alerts the user to movement within its scanning arc. Essential for perimeter security in hostile territory.
Motion Detector.description:
Effects

  • Detects moving creatures and vehicles within a 60-degree arc out to 4 range bands.
  • Provides early warning of approaching threats. Battery lasts for 6 hours.

Portable Generator.flavor: A gasoline-powered generator that provides enough electricity to run equipment, recharge batteries, and power lights. Heavy and loud, but indispensable for extended field ops.
Portable Generator.description:
Effects

  • Provides continuous power to equipment and devices in the field.
  • Operates for 8 hours on a full tank of fuel.
  • Loud: audible from a considerable distance while running.
  • Bulky: requires a vehicle or multiple people to transport.

Multitool.flavor: A multitool is a compact, portable device that combines several tools into one. It typically includes a knife, pliers, screwdrivers, and other useful implements for a variety of tasks in the field.
Multitool.description:
Effects

  • Provides a variety of tools for utility purposes, such as cutting, gripping, and screwing. Can be used for minor repairs, opening containers, or other tasks that require access to multiple tools in a compact form.

Lock Picking Set.flavor: A lock picking set is a collection of tools used to manipulate the components of a lock to open it without the original key. It can be an essential tool for gaining access to secured areas or containers in the field.
Lock Picking Set.description:
Effects

  • Allows you to attempt to pick locks on doors, containers, or other secured objects. The TN for picking a lock is determined by the GM based on the complexity of the lock.

Qualities

  • Suspicious: While not illegal, being caught with a lock picking set without a good excuse can open you up to further scrutiny.

Photo of Someone You Care About.flavor: A photo of someone you care about can provide a moment of comfort and motivation in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Photo of Someone You Care About.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Good Coffee.flavor: A cup of good coffee can provide a moment of comfort and a much-needed boost of energy in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Good Coffee.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Worn Paperback Novel.flavor: A worn paperback novel can provide a moment of comfort and escape in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Worn Paperback Novel.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Deck of Playing Cards.flavor: A deck of playing cards can provide a moment of comfort and entertainment in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Deck of Playing Cards.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Musical Instrument.flavor: A musical instrument can provide a moment of comfort and entertainment in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Musical Instrument.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Boxed Set of your favorite TV Show.flavor: A boxed set of your favorite TV show can provide a moment of comfort and entertainment in the harsh realities of the wastes.
Boxed Set of your favorite TV Show.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Lucky Charm.flavor: Whether it's a rabbit's foot, a four-leaf clover, or a sentimental trinket, a lucky charm can provide a small boost of confidence and hope in the face of adversity.
Lucky Charm.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits, but can be a source of psychological comfort and a small morale boost in stressful situations.

Spare T-Doll Frame.flavor: A spare T-Doll frame is a backup body that can be used to replace a damaged or destroyed T-Doll. It can be a valuable asset for maintaining your forces in the field.
Spare T-Doll Frame.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to replace a destroyed T-Doll, allowing you to bring them back into action after being taken out of commission.

Blank Neural Core.flavor: A blank neural core is an unprogrammed artificial brain, ready and waiting to accept either a backup of a neural cloud, or a brand new one.
Blank Neural Core.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to replace a destroyed Neural Core, allowing you to load a backup or create a new t-doll entirely.

Dummy Link.flavor: Inserted in place of a neural core, allows a nearby T-doll to control the frame as if it were her own. In practice only resulted in a 30% improvement to combat efficiency compared to the T-doll alone.
Dummy Link.description:
Effects

  • When installed in a T-Doll frame, allows you to link it to another T-doll with a working neural core.
  • While linked, The T doll can choose which frame to perform an action with, and can perform any action they otherwise would know.
  • Does not grant more actions.

Maintenance Kit.flavor: A maintenance kit contains the tools and materials necessary for performing repairs and upkeep on T-Dolls in the field. It can be a valuable resource for keeping your forces in top condition.
Maintenance Kit.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to perform maintenance on a T-Doll, repairing damage and restoring functionality. The specific effects and amount of repair provided are determined by the GM based on the condition of the T-Doll and the quality of the maintenance performed.

Emergency Neural Cloud Backup.flavor: A compact, hardened storage device that can create and store a complete backup of a T-Doll's Neural Cloud. Can be loaded into a new core if the original is destroyed.
Emergency Neural Cloud Backup.description:
Effects

  • Can create a full backup of a T-Doll's Neural Cloud. Backup process takes 10 minutes.
  • If the T-Doll's neural core is destroyed, the backup can be loaded into a blank core, restoring all memories up to the backup point.
  • One-time use: the storage device is consumed in the backup process.

Water Purification Tablets.flavor: Water purification tablets are a compact and effective way to make contaminated water safe to drink. They can be a crucial resource for survival in the field, where access to clean water may be limited.
Water Purification Tablets.description:
Effects

  • When added to a container of water, purifies it and makes it safe to drink.
  • Can be used on any water source, including stagnant pools, river water, or even water contaminated with certain toxins or pathogens.

Flask.flavor: A simple container for holding liquids, useful for carrying water or other beverages.
Flask.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to carry water or other liquids.

Syringe.flavor: A syringe is a small, handheld device used for injecting or withdrawing fluids. It can be a useful tool for administering medicine or drawing blood in the field.
Syringe.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to administer a drug or draw blood.

Disguise Kit.flavor: Makeup, wigs, fake facial hair, and other materials for creating disguises to blend in with different groups or evade detection.
Disguise Kit.description:
Effects

  • Can be used to create and apply disguises, allowing you to blend in with different groups or evade detection. The specific effects and quality of the disguise are determined by the GM based on the materials used and the skill of the user.

Pre-War Vintage Wine.flavor: A bottle of genuine pre-war wine from a Bordeaux vineyard that no longer exists. The label is faded, the cork is dry, and the bottle is worth more than most people make in a year.
Pre-War Vintage Wine.description:
Effects

  • Provides no mechanical benefits. It is a bottle of wine that has survived the end of the world.
  • As a luxury item, it can be traded for favors, sold to collectors, or shared on a very special occasion.

Active Camouflage Module.flavor: An experimental optical camouflage system that bends light around the wearer, rendering them nearly invisible. Unstable, power-hungry, and illegal.
Active Camouflage Module.description:
Effects

  • When activated, the wearer becomes nearly invisible for 1 scene.
  • While active, the wearer gains a significant bonus to Stealth checks and cannot be targeted by attacks that require line of sight.
  • Power draw is extreme: the module requires a scene of recharge between uses.
  • Illegal: possession carries severe penalties under URNC law.

Orbital Beacon.flavor: A military-grade orbital targeting beacon that designates coordinates for a kinetic strike from a URNC orbital platform. The consequences of using it without authorization are severe.
Orbital Beacon.description:
Activation

  • Deploy the beacon at your current location. Arming and calibration requires a full round action.
  • Once calibrated, the beacon transmits targeting data for 3 rounds, emitting a bright pulsing light and audible signal tone.

Effects

  • After 3 rounds of transmission, an orbital kinetic strike impacts the designated area.
  • All targets within range 10 suffer a Severity 20 Critical and are killed instantly.
  • The blast creates a crater that becomes difficult terrain.

Qualities

  • Bulky: Requires at least 2 characters to carry.
  • Illegal: Possession is a capital offense under URNC law.
  • Traceable: Transmission can be traced by URNC signals intelligence.

Standard Doll Limb (Used).flavor: A standard T-Doll limb assembly, salvaged or surplus. Intended for installation in a Doll frame, the limb connects to standard synthetic interfaces and performs at full specification. Scuffs, cosmetic damage, and minor wear are common. The function is sound.
Standard Doll Limb (Used).description:
Notes

  • Compatible with standard T-Doll frame interfaces only. Requires a Doll frame or a neural bridge for operation.
  • Used condition: may show cosmetic wear, but mechanical function is at full specification.

Standard Doll Limb (New).flavor: A brand-new T-Doll limb assembly in factory-sealed packaging. Unblemished, full warranty, no prior service history. The clean lines of a limb that has never been used, never been damaged, never been carried into a zone it was not designed for.
Standard Doll Limb (New).description:
Notes

  • Compatible with standard T-Doll frame interfaces only. Requires a Doll frame or a neural bridge for operation.
  • New condition: pristine, never installed.

Adapted Doll Limb (Used).flavor: A standard T-Doll limb assembly adapted for human installation. The hardware is the same as any Doll limb: identical motors, identical actuators, identical weapon interface points. What changes is the mount and the cleanliness. A bio-compatible skeletal graft replaces the standard frame connector, and the entire assembly has been sterilized to medical-grade standards. The wiring runs straight to the neural bridge, bypassing the existing nervous system entirely. Previously owned, but the adaptation is the expensive part.
Adapted Doll Limb (Used).description:
Effects

  • Same hardware as a standard Doll limb: identical performance and capabilities.
  • Equipped with a bio-compatible skeletal mount for grafting onto human bone.
  • Wiring bypasses the existing nervous system and connects directly to a neural bridge.
  • Requires a neural bridge (sold separately) and a recovery period of 2-4 weeks for the brain to remap its body schema.

Adapted Doll Limb (New).flavor: A brand-new T-Doll limb, adapted for human installation straight from the workshop. The bio-compatible mount has been machined and fitted. The wiring harness terminates in neural bridge-standard connectors. The assembly has been sterilized, sealed, and certified. The part is indistinguishable from a standard Doll limb in combat. The difference is that it will not reject when grafted to a living skeleton.
Adapted Doll Limb (New).description:
Effects

  • Same hardware as a standard Doll limb: identical performance and capabilities.
  • Equipped with a bio-compatible skeletal mount for grafting onto human bone.
  • Wiring bypasses the existing nervous system and connects directly to a neural bridge.
  • Requires a neural bridge (sold separately) and a recovery period of 2-4 weeks for the brain to remap its body schema.

Doll Limb with Installation (Used).flavor: An adapted Doll limb and the surgery to install it, bundled as a package. The limb is pre-owned but the adaptation work is sound: bio-compatible mount, sterilized assembly, neural bridge-ready wiring. Whoever had it before upgraded or died. Either way, a surgeon will find it a new home at the end of a human humerus.
Doll Limb with Installation (Used).description:
Effects

  • Includes an adapted Doll limb (used) and the surgical installation procedure.
  • Grafts the bio-compatible mount to the patient's skeleton and connects limb wiring to the neural bridge.
  • Requires a neural bridge (sold separately). Recovery period of 2-4 weeks post-surgery.
  • The patient experiences phantom sensations during recovery as the brain remaps its body schema.

Doll Limb with Installation (New).flavor: A new adapted Doll limb and full surgical installation package. The limb has never been used, the bio-compatible mount has never been grafted, and the surgeon's calendar has an opening. All that is missing is the neural bridge and a patient willing to trade a limb for something better.
Doll Limb with Installation (New).description:
Effects

  • Includes a new adapted Doll limb and the surgical installation procedure.
  • Grafts the bio-compatible mount to the patient's skeleton and connects limb wiring to the neural bridge.
  • Requires a neural bridge (sold separately). Recovery period of 2-4 weeks post-surgery.
  • The patient experiences phantom sensations during recovery as the brain remaps its body schema.

Neural Bridge (Used).flavor: A pre-owned neural bridge, removed from a previous host. The microfilament conduits have been sterilized, the junction unit tested, and the firmware wiped. Second-hand neurohardware carries no memories, only the faint possibility that the previous owner did not survive the recovery period.
Neural Bridge (Used).description:
Effects

  • Required for any transhuman augmentation. Translates electrochemical nerve signals into T-Doll digital protocols and vice versa.
  • Surgically implanted at the brainstem, wired into the central nervous system through microfilament conduits.
  • Requires a 12-hour surgery and months of recovery. Some patients never fully adapt.
  • Enables installation of adapted Doll limbs and compatible T-Doll modules (maximum 2 module slots for partial augmentation).

Neural Bridge (New).flavor: A neural bridge, fresh from the manufacturer. Factory calibration, sterile packaging, full warranty. The bridge has never been touched by human cerebrospinal fluid. That changes at the discretion of the buyer and the skill of the surgeon.
Neural Bridge (New).description:
Effects

  • Required for any transhuman augmentation. Translates electrochemical nerve signals into T-Doll digital protocols and vice versa.
  • Surgically implanted at the brainstem, wired into the central nervous system through microfilament conduits.
  • Requires a 12-hour surgery and months of recovery. Some patients never fully adapt.
  • Enables installation of adapted Doll limbs and compatible T-Doll modules (maximum 2 module slots for partial augmentation).

Neural Bridge with Installation (Used).flavor: A neural bridge and the surgery to implant it, as a package deal. The hardware is pre-owned but certified functional. The surgical team has done this before. The price includes the operating theater, the anesthesia, and the twelve hours on the table. Recovery is not included because recovery cannot be bought.
Neural Bridge with Installation (Used).description:
Effects

  • Includes a neural bridge and full surgical implantation procedure.
  • 12-hour surgery, months of recovery.
  • Enables installation of adapted Doll limbs and compatible T-Doll modules.

Neural Bridge with Installation (New).flavor: Everything you need to cross the line between human and transhuman: a brand-new neural bridge, a certified surgical team, and a scheduled slot in a licensed operating theater. The price covers the hardware, the procedure, and the hospital stay. All you bring is your fear and your consent form.
Neural Bridge with Installation (New).description:
Effects

  • Includes a new neural bridge and full surgical implantation procedure.
  • 12-hour surgery, months of recovery.
  • Enables installation of adapted Doll limbs and compatible T-Doll modules.

Containment Unit (Used).flavor: A pre-owned containment unit, previously occupied. The nutrient bath has been drained, the circulation pump serviced, and the biological traces scrubbed. The unit is empty and ready for a new tenant. The previous occupant is not included. Whether they survived the conversion or not is not listed in the specifications.
Containment Unit (Used).description:
Effects

  • Houses the brain, spinal column, heart, and lungs in a sterile nutrient bath for full-body conversion.
  • Sealed against Collapse radiation. Halts ELID progression entirely.
  • Connects to a fully synthetic Doll frame, granting full T-Doll module capacity and capabilities.
  • Requires maintenance: nutrient bath refreshed every 6 months, circulation pump has a rated lifespan.
  • If the unit is breached, the occupant's organs are exposed to ambient radiation.

Containment Unit (New).flavor: A brand-new containment unit, fresh from the assembly line. Zero service hours, unused nutrient seals, and the faint sterile smell of a machine that has never held a human life inside it. The purchase order alone is enough to make most people reconsider their priorities.
Containment Unit (New).description:
Effects

  • Houses the brain, spinal column, heart, and lungs in a sterile nutrient bath for full-body conversion.
  • Sealed against Collapse radiation. Halts ELID progression entirely.
  • Connects to a fully synthetic Doll frame, granting full T-Doll module capacity and capabilities.
  • Requires maintenance: nutrient bath refreshed every 6 months, circulation pump has a rated lifespan.
  • If the unit is breached, the occupant's organs are exposed to ambient radiation.

Containment Unit with Installation (Used.flavor: A pre-owned containment unit paired with a full-body conversion surgery. The hardware has been used before, but the surgical protocol is current. The cost is still more than most people earn in a lifetime, just slightly less than a new unit. Survival is not guaranteed. The surgeon's fee is paid in advance.
Containment Unit with Installation (Used.description:
Effects

  • Includes a used containment unit and the full-body conversion surgical procedure.
  • 30-40 hour surgery performed by multiple surgical teams. ~40% survival rate.
  • On success: fully synthetic Doll frame, halts ELID progression, full T-Doll module capacity.
  • Humanity drops to 30 upon waking. Months of adjustment and recalibration follow.

Containment Unit with Installation (New).flavor: The complete package: a new containment unit, a top-tier surgical team, a White Zone medical facility, and a dedicated recovery suite. The price is what you pay for the best possible odds of surviving full-body conversion. The forty percent survival rate does not change, but at least the equipment is pristine.
Containment Unit with Installation (New).description:
Effects

  • Includes a new containment unit and the full-body conversion surgical procedure.
  • 30-40 hour surgery performed by multiple surgical teams. ~40% survival rate.
  • On success: fully synthetic Doll frame, halts ELID progression, full T-Doll module capacity.
  • Humanity drops to 30 upon waking. Months of adjustment and recalibration follow.

IOP Hornet.flavor: A quad-rotor reconnaissance drone the size of a large suitcase. Operated remotely via a dedicated control tablet, the Hornet carries a stabilized multi-spectral camera package and a limited-flight endurance battery. It is not built for combat, but its small profile and quiet electric motors make it invaluable for urban reconnaissance, target designation, and perimeter surveillance. The Hornet's collapse-shielded electronics allow it to operate in Yellow Zone conditions where satellite coverage is unreliable.
IOP Hornet.description:
Standard Equipment

  • Multi-spectral camera (visual, thermal, low-light).
  • Collapse-shielded avionics.
  • 30-minute flight endurance.
  • Control tablet with 2 km effective range.

Notes

  • The Hornet is a consumable piece of equipment, not a vehicle. If destroyed, it is lost.
  • The Hornet can be used to scout ahead, providing early warning of ambushes or obstacles.
